resume_paste: Benjamin Cleek (847)707-6794 | ben.cleek@icloud.com | LinkedIn EDUCATION Butler University, Lacy School of Business Indianapolis, IN Bachelor of Business Administration, Marketing Expected May 2027 Awards: Lacy Business Scholar Recipient Relevant Coursework: Marketing Management, Marketing Analytics, Visual Art, Statistics, Information Technology, Operations & Supply Chain, Business Applications with Excel, Business Calculus, Accounting, Microeconomics, Macroeconomics, Ethics Study Abroad: WHU – Otto Beisheim School of Management, Vallendar Germany Spring 2026 CORE COMPETENCIES Brand Strategy | Marketing Communications | Market Research & Consumer Insights | Product Positioning | Trade Show & Event Marketing | Content Development | Sales Enablement | Customer Engagement | CRM & HubSpot Navigation | Competitive Analysis | Cross-Functional Collaboration | Problem Solving & Execution RELEVANT EXPERIENCE Sales & Marketing Intern | Trulli Audio — Mundelein, IL May 2025 - Aug 2025 Represented the brand at multiple trade shows, delivering product demos, engaging attendees, and generating qualified sales leads. Supported the company’s first B2B and D2C sales efforts, joining initial sales calls and contributing to early sales process development. Conducted market research to identify prospective dealers and installers, presenting insights to leadership and helping shape the go-to-market strategy and primary sales deck. Marketing Intern | Trulli Audio — Mundelein, IL May 2024 - Aug 2024 Supported the founder in building early-stage marketing infrastructure for a pre-revenue hardware startup, contributing to promotions, online platforms, and customer engagement initiatives. Organized and analyzed sales and product data in Excel to inform promotional planning and market positioning. Served as the team’s product tester for wireless audio features, identifying bugs and usability issues that guided product refinements prior to launch. SELECTED PROJECT EXPERIENCE Branding Project – Jaguar Motors | Marketing Management | Butler University Conducted a full brand audit of Jaguar’s current market position, analyzing segmentation, targeting, and positioning along with competitor benchmarking and industry trends. Developed a refreshed brand strategy to increase appeal among younger consumers, including updated messaging, EV-focused positioning, and a revised marketing mix across product, price, place, and promotion. Chief Technology Officer | Team Business: Lap It Up Drinkware | Real Business Experience (R.B.E.) | Butler University Designed and managed the team’s website and e-commerce platform, supporting smooth ordering, customer communication, and inventory tracking for a fully student-run venture. Partnered with a 5-member team to develop, validate, and market a real product, driving digital marketing and sales efforts that generated ,128 in revenue and a profitable closeout. ADDITIONAL INFORMATION Technical Skills: Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint), Google Workspace, HubSpot, Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Lightroom, Premiere, SurveyMonkey, ZoomInfo, Shopify (beginner) Languages: Intermediate German Interests: Automotive & Motorsports, Brand Strategy, Tennis, Golf, Travel
cover_letter: Benjamin Cleek (847)707-6794 | ben.cleek@icloud.com | LinkedIn [Date:] [Hiring Team] [Hiring Company] Re: Application for [Position Title] Hi Hiring Team, I am a marketing student at Butler University, and when I learned about the opportunity with [Company Name], it immediately felt like the kind of environment where I could learn in a real and meaningful way. I am especially drawn to your work because [insert one specific detail about the company, recent project, brand positioning, or industry focus]. I have always been interested in brands that know who they are and communicate that clearly, which is why the automotive and motorsports space feels like the right fit for me. Growing up, this industry was always part of my world, and it is what sparked my interest in brand strategy. I am hoping to contribute to a team that values thoughtful work and steady progress, and your program stands out as a strong match. Much of what I have worked on so far has helped me understand how brands earn trust and loyalty. At Trulli Audio, I supported early stage marketing where everything was built from the ground up. I worked trade shows, helped with sales enablement materials, researched competitors and customer segments, and contributed to the first go to market strategy. I also completed a brand audit and strategy project for Jaguar Motors at Butler, where my team refreshed their positioning for younger consumers. These experiences showed me that I am at my best when I am researching, organizing insights, and helping shape the direction of a brand. I enjoy the process of understanding what makes customers care and translating that into clear strategic ideas. For Summer 2026, I am hoping to join a company that is steady, collaborative, and committed to thoughtful brand building. I would love to contribute to a team where I can bring curiosity, strong follow through, and a calm, steady approach to every project. I would value a chance to work in an environment that combines creativity with structure. I look forward to the opportunity to learn from your team and contribute to the work you are doing. Thank you for considering my application. Sincerely, Ben Cleek
extra_context: I don't think there's anything else at the moment.
jobText: May 26 to August 1 2026, dates flexible, 25 to 30 hrs per week, paid. The Missner Group is seeking a motivated and adaptable Marketing and Communications Intern to join the team for Summer 2026. The intern reports directly to the Director of Marketing and Communications and works collaboratively to develop a customized plan aligned with individual goals while gaining direct exposure to company leadership and insight into marketing within a fully integrated real estate and construction firm. Responsibilities include assisting with social media and content creation, helping develop project case studies and marketing materials, supporting company events and campaigns, organizing photos files and marketing assets, and providing general marketing support. Looking for a Junior or Senior pursuing a degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field, with strong communication and organizational skills, eagerness to learn, reliability, detail orientation, proactivity, and ability to commute daily to Des Plaines near O'Hare Airport. No prior experience required.

metadata.job_label: Missner Group Marketing and Communications Intern
